name: Advanced SQL — Azure Managed Identity demo

parameters.query: SELECT TOP (@p1) Id, Name, CreatedAt FROM dbo.Customers WHERE Region = @p2 ORDER BY CreatedAt DESC

meta.description: Demonstrates the Advanced SQL node querying Azure SQL using a system-assigned managed identity. Create an 'advancedSqlApi' credential with engine=mssql, authentication=azureManagedIdentity, host=<server>.database.windows.net, database=<db>, then replace the credential id above.
